author: sdking
description: Rich tables with merges, styles, and choice columns, wikilinks inside fenced code blocks. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: sdking.xing
manifest.description: Interactive tables with merges, typed columns, styles, and wikilinks inside fenced code blocks.
manifest.name: Rich Table

name: Rich Table

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🚀 New features
- highlight selected rows/cols in table during selector strip drag
- Excel-style row/col selector strips with A:B column-range notation
- add A:B column-range notation and semantic row/col style buttons

## 🐛 Bug fixes
- keep selection highlight while panel open; prevent panel stacking

## 📝 Documentation
- update README, template, and skill for row/col selector strips and A:B notation
- add YAML quoting rule for column names with special characters
- restore planned features section (user-facing roadmap)
- restore Claude Code skill section (user-facing feature)
- clean up repo — remove unused design assets, rewrite README for readability

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/SdKay/obsidian-rich-table/compare/0.1.7...0.1.8
